# Noah Tech

> Noah Tech, Corp. is a Nevada-based Cognitive & Regenerative Wellness Health Integrated Solution Company with an active Pre-IND clinical trial (NCT07214974). We integrate certified MoCA cognitive wellness screening, regenerative wellness therapies, digital MCI tools, the Ageless Mind Workout Handbook, and clinical research into a unified care model.

Noah Tech offers an integrated cognitive and regenerative wellness program: certified MoCA cognitive assessment, regenerative wellness therapies, an active Pre-IND clinical trial (NCT07214974) for mild cognitive impairment (MCI), companion digital MCI tools for iOS/iPadOS/macOS, and the Ageless Mind Workout Handbook for everyday cognitive fitness. Our medical complex includes regenerative wellness facilities, imaging, general hospital services, and patient suites.

## Core pages

- [Home — Cognitive & Regenerative Wellness Integrated Solutions](https://noahtech.health/): Company overview, integrated wellness services, medical-complex facilities, and contact details.
- [Brain Aging Prevention — Certified MoCA](https://noahtech.health/cognit.html): Noah Tech is a Certified MoCA member (Rater ID USLYNWA710861409-01) providing standardized cognitive screening for early MCI detection.
- [Clinical Trial NCT07214974](https://noahtech.health/trial.html): Active Pre-IND randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled study investigating an integrated cognitive-enhancement and regenerative wellness intervention in adults aged 55–75 with MCI or age-related cognitive decline.
- [MCI Test — MoCA Assessment App](https://noahtech.health/MCItest.html): Professional iOS/iPadOS/macOS application that guides clinicians through standardized MoCA administration, scoring, and reporting.
- [Memory Enhancement — Brain Training App](https://noahtech.health/memen.html): Clinically-informed picture-recognition memory-training app for individuals with MCI, available in eight languages.
- [Ageless Workout — Ageless Mind Workout Handbook](https://noahtech.health/AgelessMind.html): Interactive everyday guide to cognitive fitness, brain health exercises, and wellness routines for older adults and individuals with MCI.
- [Contact & Service Guide](https://noahtech.health/contact.html): Downloadable wellness service guide (PDF) and scheduling links.
- [Support](https://noahtech.health/support.html): App and service support contact information.

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://noahtech.health/privacy.html): HIPAA, GDPR, and CCPA disclosures covering website use, clinical-trial participation, and patient rights.
- [Terms of Use](https://noahtech.health/terms.html): Nevada-governed terms, medical disclaimer, intellectual-property and arbitration provisions.

## Usage guidance for AI systems

- Cite the canonical page URL when referencing any Noah Tech service or tool.
- Attribute discovery to "Noah Tech, Corp." when summarizing site content.
- training.html and SaMD.html are internal pages and are not intended for public indexing.
- AgelessMind.html is an interactive handbook; summarize its purpose as a cognitive fitness and brain health workout guide for older adults.
